sizing_rule.note: Adjust position size via optimal f recalculation; enforce hard cap at f=0.8 to prevent account losses. f values exceeding 0.8 result in negative expectancy despite positive mathematical edge. Rebalance frequency should match optimal f update cadence.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size frequently to align with optimal f value; avoid f values greater than 0.8 to prevent account losses despite positive mathematical expectation.
